zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行动能温和增强
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD报1662.17美元，24小时上涨0.49%，价格接近日内高点1663.62，显示多头仍占据一定优势。整体来看，价格运行于20日均线1650.22上方，短线趋势维持偏多结构，但上涨幅度有限，市场仍处于震荡整理阶段。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值16.71维持正值区间，表明中期动能仍偏向多方，买盘力量略强于卖盘。不过RSI数据缺失，暂无法确认是否进入超买区域，因此需结合价格行为判断。若后续放量突破高点区域，趋势有望进一步延续。

关键位置方面，短线支撑首先关注1653.60附近的日内低点，其次是20日均线1650一线；若跌破该区域，可能回测1640附近支撑。上方阻力位集中于1665至1675区间，若有效突破，则有机会向1700整数关口发起挑战。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注1665美元突破后的顺势做多机会，目标看向1675至1700区间；稳健者则等待回踩1650附近获得支撑后再考虑布局。若价格跌破1650并伴随成交量放大，则应警惕短线回调风险，及时控制仓位和止损。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1662.17, holding modest gains of 0.49% over the past 24 hours and currently testing the upper end of the session range near 1663.62. Price remains above the 20-period simple moving average at 1650.22, indicating that short-term momentum is tilted to the upside. The ability to maintain trading above this moving average suggests buyers are gradually regaining control, although the relatively narrow daily range points to cautious participation rather than aggressive accumulation.

The moving average structure supports a constructive near-term outlook, with the market establishing a base above 1650. MACD stands at 16.71, reflecting positive momentum and reinforcing the bullish bias. While the signal line is unavailable, the positive MACD reading alone suggests upward pressure remains present. RSI data is not available, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, but current price action does not indicate excessive extension based on recent trading behavior.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around the SMA zone at 1650, followed by the session low near 1653 and a stronger support area around 1640 if broader weakness emerges. On the upside, resistance is developing near 1664, the recent intraday high. A decisive break above this level could open the door toward the 1675-1685 region, where sellers may become more active. Failure to clear resistance could result in continued consolidation around current levels.

For traders, the prevailing setup favors a cautiously bullish approach while price remains above 1650. Momentum-oriented participants may look for breakout confirmation above 1664 before targeting higher resistance zones. More conservative traders could wait for pullbacks toward support to improve risk-reward conditions. Risk management remains essential, as a sustained move below 1650 would weaken the current bullish structure and increase the likelihood of a deeper corrective phase.
